invariant_AllStateChangingFunctionsProte.details: All public state-changing functions have nonReentrant modifier

invariant_AvailableYieldNonNegative().details: getAvailableYield should never return negative (impossible in Solidity, but check for 0 minimum)

invariant_NoZeroPrincipalTreasuries().details: If a treasury exists, it must have principalShares > 0

invariant_PrincipalNeverDecreasesExceptW.details: Tracks total principal to ensure it only decreases via completeWithdrawal  This invariant is tested via stateful fuzzing in the handler below

invariant_TotalPrincipalEqualsSum().details: Critical for accounting correctness  INVARIANT: totalPrincipal == sum(treasuries[agent].principalShares)

targetSenders().details: Returns sender allowlist configured via `targetSender` (empty means no sender allowlist).

testFuzz_Deposit_BoundaryMinAmount(uint2.details: Tests that MIN_DEPOSIT is enforced and valid amounts succeed  GAS OPTIMIZATION HINT: The deposit function does 3 external calls (transferFrom, approve, wrap). Consider batching these if the token supports permit2.

testFuzz_Deposit_LargeAmount(uint256).details: Tests behavior with very large (but reasonable) amounts

testFuzz_Deposit_MultipleDeposits(uint25.details: Tests that multiple deposits from same agent sum correctly  GAS OPTIMIZATION HINT: Multiple deposits each call _accrueYield. If frequent deposits expected, consider a batch deposit function.

testFuzz_Deposit_ValidAmount(uint256).details: Tests deposits from MIN_DEPOSIT to large amounts

testFuzz_ERC8004_SetOnFirstDeposit(uint2.details: ID should be set only on first deposit

testFuzz_Stateful_DepositWithdrawIntegri.details: Foundry will call these functions in random order to test invariants

testFuzz_Withdrawal_FullPrincipal(uint25.details: Agent should be able to withdraw entire principal  NOTE: After full withdrawal, totalPrincipal is 0, so getTreasuryInfo()  would cause division by zero in getAvailableYield(). We use the direct treasuries() getter instead to check principalShares directly.

testFuzz_Yield_CannotSpendMoreThanAvaila.details: SpendYield should revert for amounts > availableYield

testFuzz_Yield_SpendingReducesAvailable(.details: After spending, available yield should decrease

testFuzz_Yield_WithSimulatedYield(uint25.details: Tests yield accrual by minting additional wstETH to treasury  GAS OPTIMIZATION HINT: getAvailableYield does 2 external calls and complex math. Cache this value if called multiple times in a transaction.

testFuzz_Yield_ZeroAfterDeposit(uint256).details: No yield can exist before time passes or rebasing occurs

test_Reentrancy_SpendYieldHasProtection(.details: spendYield() should have nonReentrant modifier      Note: This test verifies the function works correctly with yield available

invariant_AllStateChangingFunctionsProte.notice: Invariant: No reentrancy possible in any state-changing function

invariant_AvailableYieldNonNegative().notice: Invariant: Available yield is always non-negative

invariant_NoZeroPrincipalTreasuries().notice: Invariant: No treasury exists without principal

invariant_PrincipalNeverDecreasesExceptW.notice: Invariant: Principal never decreases except through withdrawals

invariant_TotalPrincipalEqualsSum().notice: Invariant: Total principal equals sum of individual principals

testFuzz_Allowlist_OnlyAllowlistedRecipi.notice: Fuzz test: Only allowlisted recipients can receive yield

testFuzz_Deposit_BoundaryMinAmount(uint2.notice: Fuzz test: Deposit amounts at boundary conditions

testFuzz_Deposit_ExactMinDeposit().notice: Fuzz test: Exact minimum deposit boundary

testFuzz_Deposit_MultipleDeposits(uint25.notice: Fuzz test: Multiple deposits accumulate correctly

testFuzz_Deposit_ValidAmount(uint256).notice: Fuzz test: Valid deposit amounts succeed

testFuzz_ERC8004_SetOnFirstDeposit(uint2.notice: Fuzz test: ERC-8004 ID is stored correctly

testFuzz_ERC8004_ZeroIdNotStored().notice: Fuzz test: Zero ERC-8004 ID is not stored

testFuzz_Withdrawal_CannotExceedPrincipa.notice: Fuzz test: Withdrawal amount cannot exceed principal

testFuzz_Withdrawal_TimeLockEnforcement(.notice: Fuzz test: Withdrawal time lock enforcement

testFuzz_Yield_CannotSpendMoreThanAvaila.notice: Fuzz test: Cannot spend more yield than available

testFuzz_Yield_MultipleAgentsProportiona.notice: Fuzz test: Yield distribution among multiple agents

testFuzz_Yield_SpendingReducesAvailable(.notice: Fuzz test: Spending yield reduces available yield

testFuzz_Yield_WithSimulatedYield(uint25.notice: Fuzz test: Yield calculation with simulated yield

testFuzz_Yield_ZeroAfterDeposit(uint256).notice: Fuzz test: Available yield is zero immediately after deposit

test_Reentrancy_DepositHasProtection().notice: Test that deposit has nonReentrant protection

test_Reentrancy_SpendYieldHasProtection(.notice: Test that spendYield has nonReentrant protection

test_Reentrancy_WithdrawalHasProtection(.notice: Test that completeWithdrawal has nonReentrant protection
